name: Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 skinless boneless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, for 1-2 minutes.
2. Add the chicken strips to the skillet and lower the heat to low. Cook, stirring frequently, for 10 minutes until the chicken is cooked through.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove the chicken strips from the skillet and set them aside, keeping them warm.
4. In a small bowl, mix together a little of the cream with the flour to form a smooth paste. Set aside.
5. Pour the remaining cream into the skillet over low heat. Stir to incorporate the cooking juices. Bring to a boil, then stir in the flour mixture and reduce the heat. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens.
6. Stir in the mustard, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Return the chicken strips to the skillet, coating them with the sauce. Reheat gently over low heat until warmed through.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with parsley sprigs.
